services.heading: Our Services
services.description: We provide comprehensive software services from consulting, design, development to after-sales support
services.dev_desc: Custom software design and development for Web, Mobile and Desktop Applications
services.rental_desc: Ready-to-use software rental service, affordable and suitable for all businesses
services.consult_desc: IT Solution consulting, system planning, and technology recommendation
services.mobile_desc: Mobile app development for both iOS and Android using the latest technology
services.web_desc: Design and develop all types of websites, from Landing Pages to E-commerce
services.db_desc: Database design, development, maintenance and backup solutions

photobooth.description: Korean-style photo booth rental service with our own custom software. Ideal for Events, Weddings, Product Launches, and more.

showcase.heading: Our Portfolio
showcase.description: Sample projects we have developed for our clients
showcase.project0_desc: Various photobooth systems we have developed for clients
showcase.project1_desc: Back-office management and sales reporting system
showcase.project2_desc: Central platform for managing work, staff and organizational resources
showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution designed to handle events of all sizes, from small gatherings to large corporate events — including back-office management and multi-channel payment support.
showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant photo printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
showcase.project1_detail: A fully customizable photobooth software tailored specifically to your needs. Design your own unique interface (UI), filters, frames, stickers, and special features to create an exclusive brand experience customized 100% to your vision.
showcase.project1_features: Custom Brand UI, Bespoke Frame & Filter Engine, 100% Tailored Features, Event Specific Adaptation, Tailor-made Mechanics
showcase.project2_detail: An enterprise hub platform consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place, improving workflow efficiency and reducing unnecessary steps.
showcase.project2_features: Task management, HR & Leave management, Internal chat, Document management, Performance reporting, Single Sign-On
showcase.project3_detail: An interactive Event Registration and Lucky Draw system built for complete customization. Clients can fully design the UI, user flows, and draw mechanics to perfectly align with their brand and event theme.
showcase.project3_features: Event Registration, Lucky Draw System, Fully Customizable UI, Configurable Mechanics, Real-time Analytics, High-Concurrency Support
